title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: "Go" button on Device page under Support does not open Poly Contact Support page in browser
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to the mobile device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) to open the navigation drawer.
6. Select the connected device from the device list.
expected: The Poly Contact Support page (https://support.hp.com/contact/product/poly-lens-mobile-app/...) opens in the device's default browser.
